sections.paragraph: <entryFree id="n33658" key="e)lefanto/phxus" type="main" opt="n" TEIform="entryFree"> <orth extent="suff" lang="greek" opt="n" TEIform="orth">ἐλεφαντό-πηχυς</orth>, <gen lang="greek" opt="n" TEIform="gen">ὁ</gen>, <gen lang="greek" opt="n" TEIform="gen">ἡ</gen>, <sense id="n33658.0" n="A" level="1" opt="n" TEIform="sense"> <tr_ opt="n" TEIform="tr">ivory-armed</tr_>, <bibl n="urn:cts:greekLit:tlg0563.tlg001:14:6" default="NO" TEIform="bibl"> <author TEIform="author">Max.Tyr.</author> <biblScope TEIform="biblScope">14.6</biblScope></bibl>.</sense> </entryFree>
